use_cases: Displaying a continuous scrolling list of brand names or client logos
Showing feature highlights or selling points in a looping animation
Rendering testimonials or reviews in a marquee-style banner
Creating a news ticker for announcements or updates
Showing categories or tags in an e-commerce footer
ai_summary: A minimal marquee component that displays text items in a seamless horizontal scrolling loop using dual-layer CSS animations. The component uses a flat black-and-white visual style with border accents and large typography, making it suitable for displaying brand logos, feature lists, testimonials, or other content that benefits from continuous horizontal motion.
